interface-description.description: Customize different aspects of the editor's interface.

ImprovedLinkControls-enabled.name: Enable Improved Link Controls
ImprovedLinkControls-enabled.description: Fix the link control buttons being clickable when toggled off, also fixes the size.

LengthInEditor-enabled.name: Show Length In Editor
LengthInEditor-enabled.description: Show the levels' length in time in the top left corner.

LiveColors-enabled.name: Enable Live Colors
LiveColors-enabled.description: Show the levels' currently active colors on the bottom of the screen.

PreviewObjectColors-enabled.name: Preview Object Colors
PreviewObjectColors-enabled.description: Preview a color channel on the object buttons in the build tab.

ReferenceImage-enabled.name: Enable Reference Image
ReferenceImage-enabled.description: A button to import reference images into a level.

scrolling-description.description: How scrolling and zooming with your mouse feels in the editor.

smooth-scroll-enabled.name: Enable Smooth Scroll
smooth-scroll-enabled.description: Make scrolling and zooming in the editor smoother.

zoom-to-cursor.name: Enable Zoom to Cursor
zoom-to-cursor.description: Make scroll wheel zooming based on the cursor position.

zoom-minimum.name: Minimum Scroll Zoom
zoom-minimum.description: How far you can zoom out when scrolling.

zoom-maximum.name: Maximum Scroll Zoom
zoom-maximum.description: How far you can zoom in when scrolling.

scroll-delegate-to-vanilla.name: Delegate Custom Scroll to Vanilla
scroll-delegate-to-vanilla.description: Pass the scroll parameters to the vanilla EditorUI::scrollWheel method. This can help with compatibility with DevTools, but will yield issues with other mods that change scroll.

invert-vertical-scroll.name: Invert Vertical Scroll
invert-vertical-scroll.description: Scroll wheel goes the opposite direction vertically.

invert-horizontal-scroll.name: Invert Horizontal Scroll
invert-horizontal-scroll.description: Scroll wheel goes the opposite direction horizontally.

invert-zoom-scroll.name: Invert Zoom Scroll
invert-zoom-scroll.description: Scroll wheel zooming goes the opposite direction.

DurationDrag-enabled.name: Enable Duration Dragging
DurationDrag-enabled.description: Drag on a duration line to change the duration without going into a trigger's edit menu.
DurationDrag-enabled.enable-if-description: This feature is not compatible with Bendy Duration Lines.

MultiTextEdit-enabled.name: Enable Multi Text Edit
MultiTextEdit-enabled.description: Edit multiple text objects at once.

ObjectSummary-enabled.name: Enable Object Summary
ObjectSummary-enabled.description: Add a button in the level settings to view how many of each object there are.

OldColorTriggers-enabled.name: Enable Old Color Trigger Textures
OldColorTriggers-enabled.description: See the old color trigger textures when looking at old levels.

fixes-description.description: Different fixes that you'll likely want to keep on to improve the editing experience.

CenteredObjectButtons-enabled.name: Enable Centered Object Buttons
CenteredObjectButtons-enabled.description: Make the object sprites on the buttons in the build tab actually centered.

EditorSliderFix-enabled.name: Enable Editor Slider Fix
EditorSliderFix-enabled.description: Fix the position slider not being based on level length.

TransformFix-enabled.name: Enable Transform Control Fixes
TransformFix-enabled.description: Fix the touch issues with Transform and Scale controls.

FixIgnoreDamage-enabled.name: Fix Wave in Ignore Damage
FixIgnoreDamage-enabled.description: Fix wave sliding on slopes instead of clipping through them when ignore damage is enabled.

FixTextObjectBounds-enabled.name: Enable Text Object Transform Fix
FixTextObjectBounds-enabled.description: Fix the transform bounds for text objects such that they are not always {0, 0}. Updates them properly when the text and/or kerning is changed.

misc-description.description: Stuff that just doesn't fit in any other category.

hIDe-enabled.name: Hide IDs in the Edit Level screen
hIDe-enabled.description: Hide IDs in Edit Level screen, hold shift to show them.

PlaytestConfirmation-enabled.name: Playtest Confirmation Popup
PlaytestConfirmation-enabled.description: Show an alert asking if you want to playtest when you click the playtest button.

stop-swipe-on-shift-release.name: Stop Swipe on Shift Release
stop-swipe-on-shift-release.description: Stops swiping when shift is released before clicking is released.

other-mods-description.description: Changes Tinker can make to better integrate other mods with Tinker itself.

AlternateLassoLocation-enabled.name: Alternate Lasso Select Location
AlternateLassoLocation-enabled.description: Move the Lasso Select button to the bottom right.
AlternateLassoLocation-enabled.enable-if-description: This feature requires the Lasso Select mod.

AutoBuildHelper-description.description: Add a toggle to automate the Build Helper tool. Copy and paste objects and/or place custom objects to automatically run Build Helper on them when the toggle is on.

AutoBuildHelper-show-on-pause.name: Show on Editor Pause
AutoBuildHelper-show-on-pause.description: Show the auto build helper toggle on editor pause rather than in the editor.

AwesomeModifierIcons-description.description: Improve the Modifier blocks (D/H/J/S/F) by adding icons for each of their actions instead of the letter.

AwesomeModifierIcons-solid-border.name: Solid Border
AwesomeModifierIcons-solid-border.description: Make the border of the blocks solid instead of dotted.

AwesomeModifierIcons-show-letter.name: Show Letters
AwesomeModifierIcons-show-letter.description: Show the letters instead of hiding them.

AwesomeModifierIcons-move-f-block.name: Move F block
AwesomeModifierIcons-move-f-block.description: Move the F block to be next to the other modifier blocks rather than separated by the force blocks.

CanvasRotate-description.description: Allows the editor to rotate freely. Either with right clicking and dragging or with the Joystick. Also fixes panning while the editor is rotated during playtest.

CanvasRotate-rotate-slider-thumb.name: Rotate Slider Thumb
CanvasRotate-rotate-slider-thumb.description: Rotate the slider thumb according to the editor rotation, such that left and right always points left and right.

CanvasRotate-align-modifier.name: Align Modifier
CanvasRotate-align-modifier.description: Align placed objects to your exact camera rotation when held.

EditTools-description.description: Misc edit tools for the edit tab to make editing easier.

EditTools-camera-to-object-keybind.name: Camera to Object Keybind
EditTools-camera-to-object-keybind.description: Keybind to move the camera to the selected objects.

EditTools-object-to-camera-keybind.name: Object to Camera Keybind
EditTools-object-to-camera-keybind.description: Keybind to move selected objects to the center of the camera.

ImprovedGroupView-description.description: Show more than 20 groups at once in the Group View when selecting multiple objects with a scrollable list of the groups.

ImprovedGroupView-left-align.name: Left Align Groups
ImprovedGroupView-left-align.description: Align groups to the left like vanilla GD.

JoystickNavigation-description.description: Navigate the editor with a Joystick. Most useful for mobile one handed use.

JoystickNavigation-speed.name: Joystick Speed Multiplier
JoystickNavigation-speed.description: The speed the editor will move at when the joystick is moved.

JoystickNavigation-lock-position.name: Lock Position
JoystickNavigation-lock-position.description: Lock the Controller's position where you left it last.

JoystickNavigation-reset-position.description: Reset the Controller's position to default.

NegateInput-description.description: Press N and/or a button to negate any number input when focused.

NegateInput-always-show-negate-button.name: Always Show Negate Button
NegateInput-always-show-negate-button.description: Don't hide the negate button when a text input is not focused.

ObjectSearch-description.description: Look up objects by name. Adds an all objects tab with search.

ObjectSearch-enabled.name: Enabled
ObjectSearch-enabled.enable-if-description: This feature is not compatible with Object Groups.

ObjectSearch-load-rate.name: Load Rate
ObjectSearch-load-rate.description: How many objects can load per frame in the search tab. (To reduce Editor load slowdown)

ObjectTooltips-description.description: Tooltips with object names when hovering over an object in the build tab.

ObjectTooltips-show-object-id.name: Show Object IDs
ObjectTooltips-show-object-id.description: Show object IDs on the tooltips under the name.

RelocateBuildTools-description.description: Relocate the build tools from the editor pause menu to the edit menu.

RelocateBuildTools-icons.name: Icons
RelocateBuildTools-icons.description: Icons for the Build Tools Buttons.

RepeatingEditorButtons-description.description: Hold certain buttons in the editor to repeatedly press them.

ScrollableObjects-description.description: Scroll through editor tabs instead of navigating per page.

ScrollableObjects-enabled.name: Enabled
ScrollableObjects-enabled.enable-if-description: This feature is not compatible with Object Groups.

ScrollableObjects-speed-modifier-key.name: Speed Modifier Key
ScrollableObjects-speed-modifier-key.description: Key to hold to speed up scrolling the editor tab.

ScrollableObjects-speed-modifier.name: Speed Multiplier
ScrollableObjects-speed-modifier.description: Scroll speed multiplier when modifier key is held.

ScrollableObjects-invert-scroll.name: Invert Scroll
ScrollableObjects-invert-scroll.description: Invert the direction scrolling on the tab goes.

ScrollableObjects-scrollbar-height.name: Scrollbar Height
ScrollableObjects-scrollbar-height.description: The height the scrollbar at the bottom of the tab is.

ScrollableObjects-y-offset.name: Tab Y Offset
ScrollableObjects-y-offset.description: The Y offset of the whole tab.

SingleDeselect-description.description: Hold a modifier to deselect objects within an existing selection.

SingleDeselect-key.name: Deselect Modifier Key
SingleDeselect-key.description: Key to hold click to deselect.

StartPosTools-enabled.name: Enabled
StartPosTools-enabled.description: Show an overlay above start positions when selected with a button to playtest from it.

StartPosTools-enter-at-startpos.name: Enter key starts at Start Position
StartPosTools-enter-at-startpos.description: Enter key will start at start position like vanilla, rather than start of level.

StartPosTools-start-pos-switcher.name: Start Pos Switcher
StartPosTools-start-pos-switcher.description: Navigate through every start pos in the editor.

StartPosTools-auto-hide-switcher.name: Auto Hide Switcher
StartPosTools-auto-hide-switcher.description: Hide the switcher when not being used.

StartPosTools-hide-no-start-pos-button.name: Hide Playtest without Start Pos button

ThatPasteButton-description.description: Show warnings for paste state and paste color.

ThatPasteButton-toggle-paste-state-group.name: Show Paste State Warning on Edit Group popup

ThatPasteButton-always-show.name: Always Show the Warning
ThatPasteButton-always-show.description: Always shows the warning even if you only have one object selected.

QuickExtras-description.description: A shortcut button to edit extra properties of objects, replaces Edit Special when it isn't needed.

QuickExtras-always-show.name: Always show Edit Extras button
QuickExtras-always-show.description: Make the Edit Extras button always visible instead of replacing Edit Special.

Keybinds-description.description: Extra keybinds for navigating the editor.
